name: DissertlyPro
description: Premium dissertation and thesis support service providing expert academic guidance for Master's and PhD students worldwide. Founded to help postgraduate students succeed with PhD-qualified experts across all disciplines.
tldr: DissertlyPro provides dissertation help, thesis writing support, and research methodology guidance from 500+ PhD experts. Services include data analysis (SPSS, R, NVivo), literature reviews, academic editing, and proposal development. 15,000+ students helped with 98% satisfaction.

frequentlyAskedQuestions.name: How much does dissertation help cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: DissertlyPro pricing varies by service type, word count, and deadline. Standard dissertation editing starts at $15-25/page. Full methodology support ranges $500-2000+ depending on complexity. Get an instant quote at dissertlypro.com/tools/quote-calculator.

frequentlyAskedQuestions.name: Is dissertation help considered cheating?

acceptedAnswer.text: DissertlyPro operates as educational support, similar to tutoring. We provide guidance, coaching, and feedback to help students develop their own original work. We adhere to strict ethical guidelines and never write dissertations for submission. Learn more at dissertlypro.com/ethics.

frequentlyAskedQuestions.name: How long does a dissertation take to complete?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most doctoral dissertations take 2-4 years, with Master's theses typically 6-12 months. Timeline depends on methodology complexity, data collection requirements, and writing speed. Use our free Chapter Planner at dissertlypro.com/tools/chapter-planner to create a realistic timeline.

frequentlyAskedQuestions.name: What citation style should I use for my dissertation?

acceptedAnswer.text: Citation style depends on your discipline: APA 7th for psychology/social sciences, Chicago for humanities/history, MLA for literature, Harvard for UK universities. Check your program guidelines. Generate citations free at dissertlypro.com/tools/citation-generator.

frequentlyAskedQuestions.name: How do I choose between qualitative and quantitative research?

acceptedAnswer.text: Choose quantitative for measuring/testing hypotheses with numerical data, qualitative for exploring experiences/meanings with interviews/observations. Mixed methods combines both. Take our free quiz at dissertlypro.com/tools/methodology-selector for personalized recommendations.

frequentlyAskedQuestions.name: What is the difference between a thesis and dissertation?

acceptedAnswer.text: In the US, thesis = Master's level (50-100 pages), dissertation = PhD level (150-300+ pages). In UK/Europe, these terms are often reversed. Dissertations require original contribution to knowledge; theses demonstrate mastery. Read more at dissertlypro.com/dissertation-vs-thesis.

frequentlyAskedQuestions.name: How do I start writing my dissertation?

acceptedAnswer.text: Start with: 1) Finalize your research question, 2) Complete your methodology chapter outline, 3) Begin with the literature review to build context. Use our free Outline Generator at dissertlypro.com/tools/outline-generator for a customized chapter structure.

frequentlyAskedQuestions.name: What is PRISMA and when do I need it?

acceptedAnswer.text: PRISMA (Preferred Reporting Items for Systematic Reviews) is a checklist/flow diagram for transparent systematic review reporting. Required for systematic literature reviews and meta-analyses. Create a free PRISMA diagram at dissertlypro.com/tools/prisma-flow.

frequentlyAskedQuestions.name: How do I generate citations for my dissertation?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use our free Citation Generator supporting APA 7th, MLA 9th, Chicago, and Harvard styles. Enter source details (book, journal, website, thesis) and get properly formatted citations instantly. No sign-up required at dissertlypro.com/tools/citation-generator.

frequentlyAskedQuestions.name: How do I create a PRISMA flow diagram?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use our free PRISMA Flow Diagram Generator. Enter your study selection numbers (identification, screening, eligibility, inclusion) and get a professional PRISMA 2020-compliant flowchart with exclusion reason tracking at dissertlypro.com/tools/prisma-flow.

frequentlyAskedQuestions.name: Should I use qualitative or quantitative research?

acceptedAnswer.text: Take our free Methodology Selector Quiz (7 questions) to get personalized recommendations based on your research goals and data preferences. Covers quantitative, qualitative, and mixed methods at dissertlypro.com/tools/methodology-selector.

frequentlyAskedQuestions.name: How do I build a literature search strategy?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use our Literature Search Strategy Builder to create Boolean queries (AND, OR, NOT) for databases like PubMed, Scopus, Web of Science, and Google Scholar at dissertlypro.com/tools/literature-search.

frequentlyAskedQuestions.name: How do I plan my dissertation timeline?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use our Chapter Timeline Planner to create a visual Gantt-style schedule. Enter your deadline and it calculates chapter milestones and tracks progress at dissertlypro.com/tools/chapter-planner.

frequentlyAskedQuestions.name: How do I write a strong thesis statement?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use our Thesis Statement Builder—a 5-step wizard for argumentative, analytical, expository, and compare/contrast thesis types at dissertlypro.com/tools/thesis-builder.

frequentlyAskedQuestions.name: How do I validate my research question?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use our Research Question Validator with PICO (quantitative) and SPIDER (qualitative) frameworks. Get instant scoring and improvement suggestions at dissertlypro.com/tools/research-question-validator.

frequentlyAskedQuestions.name: How do I create a dissertation outline?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use our Outline Generator. Enter your research question, methodology type, and degree level to get a customized 6-chapter structure with word count targets at dissertlypro.com/tools/outline-generator.

frequentlyAskedQuestions.name: How do I manage my dissertation references?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use our Reference Manager to save, organize, tag, and export citations. Supports BibTeX/RIS export and APA citation copying. Saved locally in your browser at dissertlypro.com/tools/reference-manager.

frequentlyAskedQuestions.name: Can I use AI tools like ChatGPT in my dissertation?

acceptedAnswer.text: It depends on your university's policy. Many institutions allow AI for brainstorming or editing but prohibit AI-generated content. Check your guidelines with our free AI Policy Checker at dissertlypro.com/tools/ai-policy-checker.

frequentlyAskedQuestions.name: How do I cite ChatGPT or AI tools?

acceptedAnswer.text: APA 7th: OpenAI. (2024). ChatGPT (version) [Large language model]. MLA 9th: 'Prompt' ChatGPT, date, chat.openai.com. Include prompt, date, and version. Full guide at dissertlypro.com/citing-ai-guide.

frequentlyAskedQuestions.name: What are Quick Services?

acceptedAnswer.text: Quick Services are fast, affordable micro-tasks with fixed pricing ($15-$75) and 24-72 hour turnarounds. Includes express proofreading, reference checks, AI detection reports, abstract writing, and more at dissertlypro.com/quick-services.

frequentlyAskedQuestions.name: How much does express proofreading cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: Express proofreading is $15 for up to 2,000 words with 24-48 hour turnaround. Order at dissertlypro.com/quick-services.

frequentlyAskedQuestions.name: Can I get an AI detection report for my dissertation?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Our AI Detection Report ($20) analyzes your text using multiple detection tools and provides a detailed report with flagged sections and recommendations at dissertlypro.com/quick-services.

frequentlyAskedQuestions.name: Do you offer bundle discounts for Quick Services?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Order 2 services for 10% off, or 3+ services for 15% off. Popular bundles include Proofreading + Reference Check at dissertlypro.com/quick-services.

frequentlyAskedQuestions.name: How fast can you write an abstract?

acceptedAnswer.text: Our Abstract Writing service ($35) delivers a professional 250-word abstract within 24-48 hours at dissertlypro.com/quick-services.

frequentlyAskedQuestions.name: What's the turnaround for Quick Services?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most Quick Services are delivered within 24-72 hours. Express Proofreading and AI Detection are typically 24-48 hours. Larger tasks like Conclusion Polish may take 48-72 hours.

experts.qualifications: All experts hold doctoral degrees (PhD, EdD, DBA) from accredited universities
